top_articles.title: Microsoft Confirms RoguePlanet Defender Zero-Day, Says Patch is in Development
top_articles.summary: Microsoft has formally disclosed that it's working to release a patch to address a Defender zero-day codenamed RoguePlanet .   The vulnerability has now been assigned the CVE identifier CVE-2026-50656

top_articles.title: Dream Raises $260 Million at $3 Billion Valuation
top_articles.summary: The Israeli startup provides sovereign AI and cyber defenses for governments and critical infrastructure.

top_articles.title: Atlassian, Splunk Patch Critical Vulnerabilities
top_articles.summary: Splunk patched an OS command injection in AI Toolkit, while Atlassian fixed dozens of flaws in third-party dependencies.

top_articles.title: Critical Command Execution Vulnerability Patched in Cisco ISE
top_articles.summary: Insufficient validation of user input allows an attacker to gain access to the underlying OS and elevate their privileges to root.

top_articles.title: F5 Patches Critical, High-Severity NGINX Vulnerabilities
top_articles.summary: Critical flaws in NGINX could allow remote, unauthenticated attackers to cause a restart and potentially execute arbitrary code.

top_articles.title: F5 issues out-of-band patches for critical NGINX vulnerabilities

top_articles.title: CISA Warns of Actively Exploited Joomla JCE Flaw Allowing PHP Code Execution
top_articles.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday added  a maximum-severity security flaw impacting Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor (JCE) to its Known Exploited Vulnerab

top_articles.title: Microsoft Working on Patch for ‘RoguePlanet’ Zero-Day
top_articles.summary: The public PoC code exploits a race condition in Microsoft Defender to spawn a command prompt with System privileges.

top_articles.title: Oracle’s Second Monthly Security Updates Deliver 245 Patches
top_articles.summary: Oracle has released its June 2026 Critical Security Patch Update to fix vulnerabilities in Communications, EBS, Enterprise Manager and other products.
